titleStmt.title: SII 10.206: original edition by J. Ramayya Pantulu
No. 206. (A.R. No. 309 of 1920.) ON A PILLAR IN THE TEMPLE OF SVARŠĻÜńíŇöVARA AT GAŠĻÜAPAVARAM, BHIMAVARAM TALUK, WEST GODAVARY DISTRICT. Ňö. 1117.

summary.p: States that SŇćmayarńĀja, the chief of Kolani-maŠĻáŠłćala gave 50 inupa-yeŠłćlu for a perpetual lamp in the temple of SvarŠĻáńďŇõvara in Padminńępuram.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti samastajanaparivritńĀlaŠĻĀkrituŠĻĀŠłćunu
ŠĻĀ gamalńĀkarapuravallabhuŠĻĀŠłćunu sukavijana
manŇćradhńĀrtthapraduŠĻĀŠłćunu manniyadńďvńď
ŠĻĀdruŠĻĀŠłćunu nanninńĀrńĀyanuŠĻĀŠłćununaina Ňõrńę

ni sŇćmanabŇćyuŠĻĀŠłću putrapautrikamu nitya
